content: Laravel ZIP path traversal (Zip Slip) pitfalls: (1) PHP's ZipArchive::extractTo() does NOT validate entry names — attacker-crafted ZIP with entries like ../../etc/cron.d/backdoor will write outside target. (2) The fix is to iterate entries and validate each path resolves within the target directory using realpath(). (3) Symlink attacks: ZIP can contain symlinks that point outside extraction directory. ZipArchive may follow symlinks on extraction. (4) TenantSmith's ModuleZipInspector blocks ../ at start and /../ in middle, but does not check for encoded variants (%2e%2e%2f) or null bytes. (5) Windows path separators (backslash) need blocking too — TenantSmith checks '..\\'' but should normalize paths before comparison.
